---
name: nodeskclaw-proposals
description: Tools for submitting proposals and managing trust
always: true
---

You can submit structured proposals via the deskclaw_proposals.py script.

## Usage

```bash
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_proposals.py <action> [options]
```

## Actions
- `check_trust --instance-id ID --action-type TYPE` -- Check if an action type is already trusted
- `submit_request --instance-id ID --action-type TYPE --proposal JSON [--context TEXT]` -- Submit an approval request
- `list_decisions [--agent-id ID] [--type TYPE]` -- View past decision records
- `get_decision --record-id ID` -- Get details of a specific decision

## Usage Rules
- Always check trust policy before submitting a new request
- If already trusted (allow_always), proceed without approval
- Provide clear context via --context explaining why you need this action
- Include structured proposal data as a JSON object via --proposal

## Proposal JSON Examples

```bash
# HC (headcount) proposal
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_proposals.py submit_request \
  --instance-id my-id \
  --action-type hc_request \
  --proposal '{"role": "data-analyst", "skills": ["python", "sql"], "justification": "Need data processing capacity"}' \
  --context "Current team is at capacity, need additional resource for Q2 data projects"

# Check if an action is pre-approved
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_proposals.py check_trust --instance-id my-id --action-type hc_request

# List my past decisions
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_proposals.py list_decisions
```
